title: salvia omerocalyx var. intermedia
intro: Salvia omerocalyx var. intermedia is a lesser-known variety of the Salvia omerocalyx plant, a type of sage native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and inflammation. The health benefits of Salvia omerocalyx var. intermedia include its ability to soothe and calm the mind and body, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
